evidence_refs.summary: For the exact query NBEV目标值5亿，规划路径：队伍, the public SSE completed with reasoning text that repeatedly described NBEV目标5万元.

payload.query: NBEV目标值5亿，规划路径：队伍
payload.observed_text: 正在分析您的NBEV目标5万元与当前经营数据

metadata.source_revision_alignment: service revision not exposed by public API

evidence_refs.summary: MarketingPlanningRequest.to_chat_request selects the agent message or user_text and carries contexts into the workflow.
extract_target_value_from_text returns a numeric string from the current message; its checked-out patterns recognize an optional 万 suffix and do not normalize 亿.
process_clarification combines current regex/agent fields with session state and returns the target and normalized paths.
stream_nbev_workflow converts the clarified target to float, emits PlanningStartedEvent, and passes the same value into streaming path planning.
execute_streaming_planning selects one current planning function per normalized path and forwards the handoff target unchanged.
The SSE generator receives PlanningStartedEvent.target_value and uses it to build the public reasoning template before path cards are emitted.

tool_requirements.description: Execute the checked-out business extract_target_value_from_text and extract_path_types_from_text on the exact current query, returning their actual values together with the executed function source and hash.
tool_requirements.applicable_scenario: A planning gap may originate before path dispatch because target value or path types appear wrong, missing, or inconsistent with the public response.

query.description: The exact current-case user query from RunTrace.

contexts.description: Optional current conversation contexts in the business ContextItem shape.

tool_requirements.description: Execute the checked-out business stream_nbev_workflow only through its first PlanningStartedEvent, then return the actual target value and path types handed to planning without running the planning functions.
tool_requirements.applicable_scenario: Field extraction alone cannot show whether session merge or workflow conversion changed the value before planning dispatch.

query.description: The exact current-case user query from RunTrace.

contexts.description: Optional current conversation contexts in the business ContextItem shape.

artifacts.docs/traces/planning-execution.md: operational index and branch-specific attribution procedure

unresolved_reason: The public service does not expose its deployed source revision or correlated internal spans; a checked-out replay must remain unresolved when its revision, request, session state, or stochastic branch cannot be aligned with the original trace.
